pages.title: Homebrew rules
pages.excerpt: We'll be using the Matt Mercer rules for reviving characters. We will not be whisper rolling death saves. Anyone who wants to can provide a memory from their life when they have to roll a death save. If you take an action to drink a potion,

pages.title: Kalaman
pages.excerpt: The capital city of the Nightlund region. A large port city situated on Kalaman Bay.  Originally built by the Istarian Empire before they ceded the city to Solamnia after an intense battle on the plains to the west of the city. Today,
